content.speakerText: Hi, I'd like to claim my tax refund.
expectedAnswers: Sure, I can help with that. Could you please show me your passport and receipts?
Of course! I’ll assist you. Do you have your tax-free form and shopping receipts?
Absolutely! Let me help you get your refund — please hand over your passport and the stamped receipts.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正确回应退税请求，明确表示愿意协助
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的礼貌用语（如 could you, please）
表达自然度：语调自然，符合服务场景的正式但友好的语气
关键词覆盖：包含 passport, receipts, tax-free form 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Do you have your shopping receipts and tax-free form?
content.speakerTextCn: 您有购物收据和免税单吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, here they are — all signed and stamped.
I have them all. The receipts are here, and the form has the customs stamp.
Yes, I’ve got everything ready. Here’s my passport too, just in case.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认单据齐全，无遗漏或犹豫
语言准确性：使用正确动词（have, sign, stamp）和复数形式（receipts, forms）
表达自然度：语气自信、清晰，符合柜台工作人员与顾客的互动习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 shopping receipts, tax-free form, signed, stamped
